author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v4.2.0
body: # [4.2.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.3...v4.2.0) (2017-11-02) ### Bug Fixes * **connectRange:** handle boundaries on first call ([30df598](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/30df598)) * **connectRange:** use refine instead of cleanUp in metadata ([algolia/react-instantsearch#526](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/526)) ([ae6cb35](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/ae6cb35)) * **hierarchicaMenu:** allow sorting and using limit ([0d591c2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/0d591c2)), closes [algolia/react-instantsearch#92](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/92) * **InfiniteHits:** add disabled style to the LoadMore button ([algolia/react-instantsearch#477](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/477)) ([97dc21d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/97dc21d)) * **Range:** handle float, allow reset and respect boundaries ([12e1b88](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/12e1b88)) * **RangeInput:** fix compatibility with React 16 & Panel ([f3b2f89](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f3b2f89)) * **searchbox:** add maxlength 512 ([algolia/react-instantsearch#542](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/542)) ([2543cb5](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/2543cb5)), closes [#510](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/510) ### Features * **MenuSelect:** add component and connector ([bbb77aa](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/bbb77aa))
